title: sterculia longipetiolata
intro: Sterculia longipetiolata, also known as the 'Batai', is a plant species that belongs to the family Sterculiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
